query:
SELECT gameType, COUNT(*) as total,
  COUNT(*) - COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(gameType, '-', DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(drawDate/1000)), '-', COALESCE(drawTime, 'none'), '-', mainNumbers)) as duplicates
FROM draw_results
GROUP BY gameType
ORDER BY gameType;
command:

ORDER BY gameType;
